prompt: A dreamy romantic illustration of a young woman leaning out of an open cottage window, perfectly emphasizing the contrast between the sunny flower garden outside and the cozy room inside. She rests both elbows on the white-painted windowsill and cups her face in her hands, centered in the composition, with her face hidden by her pose and hair. She has very long wavy light brown hair with small white flowers tucked into it, and wears a soft vintage cream-beige floral dress with puffed sleeves and delicate lace trim. The window is a white wooden double casement window opened outward on both sides, framed by sheer lace curtains that billow gently inward and outward. The exterior wall is white painted brick or plaster, covered with climbing vines and many small white blossoms around the top and sides of the window. In the foreground outside, show a lush spring garden with an exact mix of 5 flower groups: pale pink tulips, cream-white tulips, small white daisies with yellow centers, soft lavender flower spikes, and layered pale pink garden roses or peonies, with a short white picket fence peeking up along the bottom edge. Through the window, clearly show the interior as a separate indoor space: a warm, softly lit shabby-chic room with muted beige tones, framed botanical prints on the wall, a wooden cabinet or shelf with vases and flowers, and a small delicate chandelier hanging in the background. Use gentle morning sunlight, soft shadows of vines across the wall and sill, airy pastel colors, highly detailed painterly anime-inspired realism, ethereal floral fantasy mood, serene and nostalgic atmosphere, vertical composition.
